description: Product Description HIDDEN GAMES HANGOVER - Dead won't freeze The completely different crime inner+ An old house on the edge of the city should be your weekend domicle. But the first night ends deadly for your friend Nils and you will find him dead in the ice chamber the next morning. The problem: Often nobody can remember the evening of yesterday and so slowly the mistrust grows... Recapitulates the events Who of you has Nils on your conscience? The completely different crime inner+ With this crime inner, no one knows who the perpetrator is! Your gaming experience is extended by an interactive app that lets you make one or the other decision and provides you with other material. A novel exciting combination of crime game and classic crime dinner. How the game runs Whether eating or just at the coffee table. The game is suitable for many situations and requires hardly any preparation. The materials are protected against moisture and dirt and offer other functionalities such as cutlery pockets and glass coasters. What you should pay attention Plant for 1.5 to 3.5 hours for your game - depending on whether you eat or not. Every person should use a mobile phone with internet access. You play cooperatively in the team. The most important questions Technique The game is created as a multiplayer game. With the browser-based app and the access code from your instructions, each player can join the game with their character. A permanent internet connection is required. Playing frequency The game can be played more frequently unless you describe the documents. In addition, the materials are protected against moisture and dirt/grease. order Our Hangover games can be solved in any order. It is not necessary that you first the 1st, then the 2nd case etc. Notes: Everyone is on the hose. To help you with your case investigations as much as possible, you can have a detailed help website on which you can display tips at any time without too much being revealed.
